meaning: v.滴下,落下,(使声音等)变弱,(使价格等)下降,使跌倒,使结束,不再讨论,停止与(某人)交往n.落下,下降,滴,滴剂,点滴,微量,下跌
examples: Temperatures can drop to freezing at night.
Can you drop me near the bank?
He was told to drop the idea.
Mr Ansari is sitting opposite him, and his eyes drop to the floor for a moment.
For 2002, Weiner estimates a 20% drop in capital spending for the semiconductor industry.
